scripts.dev:all: corepack pnpm --filter api --filter player-web --filter admin-web --parallel dev
scripts.db:setup: corepack pnpm --filter api prisma:generate && corepack pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate deploy && corepack pnpm --filter api prisma:seed
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v postgres && corepack pnpm db:up && corepack pnpm db:setup
scripts.dev:full: corepack pnpm db:up && corepack pnpm db:setup && corepack pnpm dev:all
